content:
🚀 quickemu | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To quickly and easily create and run optimized virtual machines for various operating systems, including Windows and macOS, on Linux and macOS hosts.
✨ Key Features: • Automated OS downloads and configuration via quickget • Optimized VM configuration based on host hardware • Support for Windows (including TPM 2.0), macOS, Linux, BSDs, and more • ARM64 guest support • Full SPICE and VirtIO-webdavd/9p file sharing
📖 Summary: Quickemu is a shell script wrapper for QEMU that simplifies the creation and management of virtual machines for Windows, macOS, Linux, and other operating systems. It automates optimal hardware configuration and OS downloads, making virtualization accessible without complex setup.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
